text: If you are neutral in situations of injustice, you have chosen the side of the oppressor.
My humanity is bound up in yours, for we can only be human together.
Hope is being able to see that there is light despite all of the darkness.
If you want peace, you don't talk to your friends. You talk to your enemies.
Do your little bit of good where you are; it's those little bits of good put together that overwhelm the world.
We are the rainbow people of God.
Forgiveness does not mean condoning what has been done. It means taking what happened seriously and not minimizing it.
Differences are not intended to separate, to alienate. We are different precisely in order to realize our need of one another.
